data.title: Lovense impresses at CES 2026, leading sex tech innovation with a focus on normalizing intimacy talks.
data.description: At the Consumer Electronics Show in Las Vegas on January 15, 2026, Lovense showcased its dedication to revolutionizing the intimacy tech sector. Known as a top player in the sex tech field, Lovense is focused on advancing conversations about the intersection of intimacy and technology. Their presence at CES 2026 highlights their significant role in shaping the industry's future.
Morgan Stanley’s Price Target Increased to $173 by JPMorgan, Up from $162

data.title: Coinbase CEO urges Congress for fair competition laws, demands 3.8% stablecoin rewards. Banks accused of stifling competition.
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. CEO Brian Armstrong, of NASDAQ: COIN, called for Congress to implement laws promoting fair competition after the delay of a cryptocurrency market structure bill. Speaking on CNBC, Armstrong stressed the need for a "level playing field" to enable all American companies to compete and innovate without unfair advantages. He criticized the potential for banks to stifle competition and highlighted the importance of consumers being able to earn 3.8% interest on stablecoins. Armstrong emphasized the right for people in the U.S. to maximize their earning potential from their assets. The full details of the story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AKG and Ca-AKG of Xin Tianhe received US Self-GRAS certification on Jan. 7, 2026, meeting FDA standards.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on January 15, 2026, Xin Tianhe Biotechnology's AKG and Ca-AKG products underwent a successful Self-GRAS evaluation on January 7, 2026, meeting US FDA GRAS standards. These products were approved, marking the first time domestic fermentation products achieved this recognition.

data.title: Coda and Unity partner to integrate IAP SDK with Coda's global web store, simplifying monetization for game devs.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Singapore, Coda, a prominent player in the field of digital content monetization, revealed its plans to merge with Unity's In-App Purchasing (IAP) SDK across Coda's worldwide web store platforms. This partnership aims to provide developers with a centralized platform for enhanced management and optimization of their digital content.
Needham Lifts Advanced Energy Target to $290

data.title: In 2025, Harford Mutual Insurance donated $600,000 to 90+ nonprofit organizations, benefiting various causes.
data.description: In January 15, 2026, Harford Mutual Insurance Group (HMIG) based in Bel Air disclosed a significant milestone, revealing their donation of approximately $600,000 over the course of 2025. This donation was dispersed among over 90 nonprofit and charitable organizations. This contribution was made possible through HMIG's initiative known as the HMIG Gives Back Program, which directly assisted various causes and initiatives.

data.title: Online food delivery market to hit USD 600 billion by 2033, doubling from USD 300 billion in 2024, with steady 8.5% CAGR.
data.description: The Online Food Delivery Services Market is experiencing significant growth due to factors such as the increasing penetration of smartphones, widespread access to the internet, and a growing preference for convenience among urban consumers. The market is also benefiting from busy lifestyles, the expansion of gig economy delivery networks, and the incorporation of AI-driven technology. Current statistics indicate a surge in market demand, with a notable increase in revenue and a rise in the number of users availing these services.

data.title: Okta launches in-country Platform tenants in India for data residency & disaster recovery, boosting security for regulated sectors.
data.description: In Bengaluru, India, Okta, Inc., the top independent identity company, is demonstrating its dedication to the Indian market by introducing Okta Platform tenants within the country. This initiative provides data residency and improved disaster recovery capabilities. It aims to support highly regulated industries like banking, financial services, insurance, and healthcare in securely embracing AI technologies and fortifying their cybersecurity measures. This move is particularly significant as Indian enterprises ramp up their AI endeavors.
US Makes Clear to Mexican Foreign Minister That Slow Border Security Gains Won’t Suffice

data.title: Aethon Energy and Mitsubishi Corporation form global alliance for energy projects, focusing on LNG. #collaboration #Aethon #Mitsubishi
data.description: A Global Strategic Alliance has been formed between Aethon Energy Management LLC and Mitsubishi Corporation. This collaboration aims to explore future commercial opportunities across energy transition and next-generation infrastructure projects globally. The alliance will focus on areas such as liquefied natural gas.

data.title: Capstone Copper reports record 2025 production of 224,764 tonnes, up 22% from 2024. Updates on Mantoverde labour negotiations.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Capstone Copper Corp. (TSX:CS) (ASX:CSC) has reported their consolidated copper production numbers for 2025. The company achieved a record annual copper production of 224,764 tonnes, surpassing their previous year's production by 22%. The figures are all in US dollars unless stated otherwise. Additionally, Capstone provided an update on Mantoverde labor negotiations.
